dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Are you okay?! You were corrupted, I had to fight this awful version of you.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: I couldn't control myself. Everything came back to me. This pendant, you gave it to me. It's the reason I'm here, right?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: ...It's one of the reasons, yes. I'm so sorry, Echo. I didn't want you to find out this way.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: You didn't want me to find out that we were best friends and that I'd lost you? I don't understand.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: It's not that simple, Echo. I called to you from the other side, here in the Astral Plane, through the pendant I gave you all those years ago.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Basically, you pulled me in here with the goal of helping you, but a side effect of the means you used was giving me amnesia?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Yes. I wanted to find the right time to tell you everything, but by the time the rumbling started and you had touched the tree...everything just moved so fast.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: Why me? Someone else could have helped you more, don't you think?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Why you? Echo...nobody else meant as much to me as you did, as you do. I gave you the pendant, remember? All the time we spent together?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Echo
dialogueLines.text: I just can't understand why you'd go out of your way to do all this. Why couldn't I have just stayed back?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Echo...you still haven't learnt the lesson. You still don't know how much you meant to me, how much good you gave to the world.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Maybe...when you close your eyes...you'll figure it out...in the next...
